title: PehkuiRandomSize
description: A simple mod using pehkui to vary the size of mobs.
body:
A simple mod can vary the size of mobs when they spawn by Pehkui. It can be configured to set the limit of size and blacklist that the mobs are unexpected to resize.
It needs [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) to work.
